hero.subtitle: Full-stack engineer building fast, production-grade apps out of Dhaka. Five-plus years across React, Next.js, Vue, Laravel — from pixel-perfect Figma builds to headless e-commerce.

about.sectionMeta: Dhaka, Bangladesh. Building for clients across three continents. Writing code as if I'll have to read it in five years.
body: Hi — I'm Noman. Full-stack engineer with 5+ years shipping production apps — Next.js, React, Vue + Laravel, and everything in between. I translate Figma designs into pixel-perfect layouts and lead a small team at SkyTech Solutions owning architecture, code reviews, and delivery.
meta: // AI-assisted workflows cut our delivery from ~1 month to ~10 days. Open to full-time remote roles.
// Published on npm · IEEE-published researcher · B.S. Computer Engineering, IUB 2024.

work.sectionMeta: Real client work across e-commerce, professional services, and corporate sites. Full case studies open inline.
work.footNote: More on request — email for full portfolio →

projects.name: Sky Freight Squad
projects.label: 01 / Logistics
projects.description: Full-stack logistics platform built on Vue 3 + Laravel — quote management, service pages, and a MySQL backend handling freight enquiries.
projects.summary: A logistics platform for a freight company. Vue 3 frontend from a Figma handoff, Laravel API, and a MySQL backend built for scale.
projects.problem: The client had no digital presence for their freight services — all enquiries came through word of mouth with no structured intake process.
projects.approach: Designed the database schema, built a RESTful Laravel API, and implemented a pixel-perfect Vue 3 frontend from their Figma designs. Built a quote request flow wired to their ops team.
projects.solution: Vue 3 SPA + Laravel REST API + MySQL. Deployed with GitHub Actions CI/CD. Admin panel for managing incoming freight enquiries.
projects.outcome: Launched on schedule. Client now receives structured inbound enquiries through the site with full intake data from day one.

projects.name: Skylight RCM
projects.label: 02 / Healthcare
projects.description: Revenue cycle management platform — Vue 3 frontend, Laravel backend, built for a healthcare services company handling sensitive billing workflows.
projects.summary: A healthcare RCM platform. Pixel-perfect Figma implementation, Laravel API, and a Vue 3 frontend built for a professional services audience.
projects.problem: The client needed a credible, professional web presence for their RCM services — one that instilled trust with healthcare providers and captured leads effectively.
projects.approach: Implemented the Figma design pixel-perfectly in Vue 3. Built a Laravel backend with MySQL, a service enquiry flow, and a secure admin area.
projects.solution: Vue 3 + Laravel + MySQL. Clean, fast frontend with trust-first design. GitHub Actions for automated deployments.
projects.outcome: Site live and converting. Client reports improved credibility with healthcare provider prospects since launch.

projects.name: Mirza Agro & Fisheries
projects.label: 03 / E-commerce
projects.description: Mango e-commerce store for a Bangladeshi agro business — product catalogue, order management, and a Vue + Laravel backend handling seasonal sales.
projects.summary: A seasonal e-commerce platform for a mango farm. Vue 3 storefront, Laravel backend — built to handle high-volume orders during the harvest season.
projects.problem: The client was taking orders through social media DMs with no inventory tracking, payment flow, or order management system.
projects.approach: Built a product catalogue with seasonal inventory, a checkout flow, and a Laravel admin panel for order management. Pixel-perfect from their Figma mockups.
projects.solution: Vue 3 storefront + Laravel API + MySQL. Product management, order tracking, and customer notification flow all in one admin panel.
projects.outcome: First season live — client processed orders digitally for the first time. Significant reduction in manual order handling overhead.

projects.name: Myrtleford Sheet Metal
projects.label: 04 / Trade Services
projects.description: Trade services website for an Australian sheet metal fabrication company — Vue + Laravel, quote request flow, and a mobile-first design.
projects.summary: A trade services site for an Australian fabrication company. Pixel-perfect Figma build, Vue 3 frontend, Laravel backend — live quote request flow.
projects.problem: The business relied entirely on referrals with no web presence. Competitors were capturing leads online while they had nothing.
projects.approach: Built from a Figma design into a Vue 3 + Laravel site. Mobile-first — most trade clients browse on phones. Integrated a quote request form direct to their inbox.
projects.solution: Vue 3 + Laravel + MySQL. Fast, clean, mobile-optimised. Automated deployment via GitHub Actions.
projects.outcome: Delivered in 4 weeks. Client now receives quote requests directly through the site from Australian customers finding them via search.

projects.name: Doctors of Lancefield
projects.label: 05 / Healthcare
projects.description: Medical practice website for an Australian GP clinic — appointment info, service pages, and a WordPress CMS the practice staff manage themselves.
projects.summary: A medical practice site for an Australian GP clinic. Trust-first design, accessible, fast — pixel-perfect from Figma, managed by the practice team.
projects.problem: The clinic needed patients to find their hours, services, and contact details quickly on mobile — their old site was slow and hard to update.
projects.approach: Custom WordPress theme from their Figma design. Accessibility-first — clear type hierarchy, high contrast, large tap targets for older patients.
projects.solution: Custom WordPress theme, no page builder — clean semantic HTML, optimised images, mobile-first. Staff update hours and content themselves.
projects.outcome: Site live and patient-facing. Loads under 1s. Practice staff manage all content without developer involvement.

projects.name: Accounting Monk
projects.label: 06 / Professional Services
projects.description: Marketing site for an Australian accounting firm — WordPress CMS, trust-first design, fast load times optimised for local search and conversion.
projects.summary: Professional services site for an Australian accounting firm. Pixel-perfect Figma implementation, fast Core Web Vitals, self-managed by the client.
projects.problem: The firm needed a credible web presence ranking locally in Australia and converting visitors to enquiries — without ongoing developer costs.
projects.approach: Custom WordPress theme built pixel-perfectly from their Figma file. Tuned for Core Web Vitals and local SEO. No page builder — clean output.
projects.solution: Custom WordPress theme with contact form wired to their inbox. Optimised images, semantic HTML, schema markup for local search.
projects.outcome: Site live and self-managed. Loads under 1.5s. Consistent inbound enquiry flow from local Australian search.

skills.sectionMeta: Biased toward the web platform. I reach for a framework when it earns its weight.

rows.context: Full-stack pairing for CMS-backed client builds.
Database design and backend APIs — enough to own the full stack.
E-commerce and CMS. Pixel-perfect implementation from Figma files.
Shipping pipelines. Code doesn't count until it's deployed.
AI-assisted workflows that halved our delivery timeline.

experience.sectionMeta: A short resume. Full CV available on request.

rows.desc: Built Next.js dashboards and Vue + Laravel client sites. Cut delivery from ~1 month to ~10 days using AI-assisted workflows. Lead code reviews, mentor juniors, own architecture and database decisions. Pixel-perfect Figma-to-code implementation on every project.

Shipped large WooCommerce stores, a membership platform, and an event management system. Built and customised WordPress themes and plugins. Clients across automotive, hospitality, healthcare, and retail in Bangladesh, Australia, and the US.

testimonials.sectionMeta: Edited lightly for length. Real names on request.

quotes.quote: Noman shipped the redesign on time and two points under Lighthouse budget. He pushes back when he should and defers when it doesn't matter — rare combination.
quotes.name: A. Rahman
quotes.title: Founder, independent e-commerce studio

quotes.quote: Fastest turnaround on a marketing site I've worked with. He reads the brief, asks one round of sharp questions, then disappears and delivers.
quotes.name: S. Chen
quotes.title: Creative Director

quotes.quote: We hired him to polish a dashboard and he ended up rearchitecting the state layer. The handoff was immaculate.
quotes.name: M. Karim
quotes.title: Engineering Lead
